video:video.video:title: Wipster / Video Feedback Tool
video:video.video:description: We developed a 'Connecting the Dots' concept to explain how Wipster's product features integrate together. The animation showcases the seamless workflow between video review, approval, and delivery, making complex collaboration feel effortless.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: Acodis / AI Document Processing
video:video.video:description: Created visuals replicating Acodis's AI data extraction technology for lay audiences. The challenge was translating deeply technical machine learning concepts into intuitive, visually compelling motion sequences that demonstrate real-world value.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: Atomic / In-App Messaging
video:video.video:description: Designed an explainer highlighting Atomic's in-app messaging capabilities. The animation demonstrates how personalised, actionable content cards are delivered directly within existing apps. No new downloads or disrupted user flows.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: Trudi / AI Property Management
video:video.video:description: Produced a product demonstration video showcasing Trudi's AI-powered property management platform. The animation walks through key workflows: tenant communication, maintenance scheduling, and financial reporting, all streamlined through intelligent automation.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: United Nations / Plastic Waste Data
video:video.video:description: A data-driven animation for the United Nations that transforms complex plastic waste statistics into compelling visual narratives. The piece was designed to support international policy discussions and drive awareness of the global plastic crisis.
video:video.video:category: Data visualisation and government explainer video

video:video.video:title: United Nations / Plastic Waste Data: Additional video
video:video.video:description: A data-driven animation for the United Nations that transforms complex plastic waste statistics into compelling visual narratives. The piece was designed to support international policy discussions and drive awareness of the global plastic crisis.
video:video.video:category: Data visualisation and government explainer video

video:video.video:title: Mosaic / Strategic Data Planning
video:video.video:description: Crafted a platform explainer for Mosaic that distils complex data planning workflows into a clear, engaging narrative. The animation guides viewers through how teams can align strategy with execution using real-time data insights.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: Meltwater / Brand Story
video:video.video:description: Crafted a cinematic brand story for Meltwater, distilling their comprehensive media intelligence platform into a compelling narrative. The animation emphasises scale, precision, and the transformation of raw media data into strategic business insights.
video:video.video:category: Brand animation and agency motion design

video:video.video:title: Trusyft / Product Promo
video:video.video:description: Created an animated product promo for Trusyft that captures the energy and innovation behind their platform. The piece blends dynamic motion design with clear product storytelling to drive engagement and conversions.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: Giraffe / Designing Cities
video:video.video:description: Animated an explainer for Giraffe's urban planning platform, demonstrating how data-driven design tools help architects and planners create better cities. The piece visualises complex spatial data in an accessible, engaging format.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: RSPCA / Saving Cats
video:video.video:description: Created an emotionally engaging animation for RSPCA's cat care programme. The piece balances heartfelt storytelling with practical information about how communities can help protect and care for vulnerable felines.
video:video.video:category: Nonprofit explainer video

video:video.video:title: RSPCA / Workplace Giving
video:video.video:description: Created an emotionally engaging animation for RSPCA's workplace giving programme. The piece balances heartfelt storytelling about animal welfare with clear, actionable steps for corporate partnerships and employee donation programs.
video:video.video:category: Nonprofit explainer video

video:video.video:title: Red Cross / Covid Vaccine Explainer
video:video.video:description: Produced a clear, empathetic explainer for the Red Cross Covid vaccine programme. The animation addresses common concerns while providing factual, easy-to-understand information about the vaccination process and its importance.
video:video.video:category: Nonprofit explainer video

video:video.video:title: Method / Beautiful Bin System
video:video.video:description: Animated an explainer for Method's beautifully designed recycling bin system. The piece demonstrates how thoughtful product design can transform waste behaviour in workplaces, making recycling intuitive and aesthetically appealing.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: Oovvuu / WordPress Plugin
video:video.video:description: Created an overview animation for Oovvuu's WordPress plugin, showing how publishers can seamlessly integrate premium video content into their articles. The piece walks through the workflow from video discovery to embedded playback.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: Food By Us / Kitchen Ordering
video:video.video:description: Animated an explainer for Food By Us's commercial kitchen ordering platform. The piece demonstrates how chefs and kitchen managers can simplify their procurement workflow, comparing prices and ordering from multiple suppliers in one place.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: Eluse & Krue / Skincare
video:video.video:description: Produced an elegant brand animation for Eluse & Krue's age-reducing skincare line. The piece captures the sophistication and science behind the products with refined motion design and a premium visual palette.
video:video.video:category: Brand animation and agency motion design

video:video.video:title: Bat Nav / Big Battery Power
video:video.video:description: Created a platform explainer for Bat Nav's big battery power management system. The animation visualises how energy storage is monitored, optimised, and dispatched, making complex energy infrastructure accessible to stakeholders.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: Class Trust / Accounting Software
video:video.video:description: Animated a motion graphic explainer for Class Trust's self-managed super fund accounting platform. The piece breaks down complex financial compliance workflows into clear, approachable visual sequences.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: Good2Pay / Paperless Invoicing
video:video.video:description: Produced an explainer for Good2Pay's paperless invoicing platform. The animation demonstrates the end-to-end workflow from invoice creation to payment, highlighting the speed, security, and simplicity of going digital.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: DRIV0 / Carpark Management
video:video.video:description: Created an explainer for DRIV0's intelligent carpark management platform. The animation visualises how sensors, data analytics, and automation combine to optimise parking operations for building managers and drivers.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: Solar My School / Empowering Schools
video:video.video:description: Animated an explainer for Solar My School's community-driven solar programme. The piece demonstrates how schools can reduce energy costs and carbon footprints through crowdfunded solar installations, engaging parents, students, and local businesses.
video:video.video:category: Nonprofit explainer video

video:video.video:title: IPA / Electric Car Road Tax
video:video.video:description: Created an explainer for IPA Australia's position on electric vehicle road taxation. The animation breaks down complex policy into clear visual arguments, making the case for fair and sustainable road funding as EV adoption accelerates.
video:video.video:category: Data visualisation and government explainer video

video:video.video:title: Braums / Touchless Road Crossing
video:video.video:description: Animated a product demo for Braums' touchless road crossing system. The piece demonstrates how sensor-based technology enables pedestrians to safely cross roads without touching physical buttons, a solution made even more relevant during the pandemic.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: InfoView / Digital Expense Management
video:video.video:description: Created an explainer for InfoView's digital expense management platform. The animation walks through the complete workflow from receipt capture to approval and reporting, showing how teams can eliminate paper-based processes.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: InfoView / Digital Expense Management: Additional video
video:video.video:description: Created an explainer for InfoView's digital expense management platform. The animation walks through the complete workflow from receipt capture to approval and reporting, showing how teams can eliminate paper-based processes.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: ACIR / Food Waste Programme
video:video.video:description: Produced an animation for ACIR's food waste reduction programme. The piece transforms food waste data into compelling visual narratives that drive awareness and action across the supply chain.
video:video.video:category: Nonprofit explainer video

video:video.video:title: Carter Coin / Crypto Explainer
video:video.video:description: Animated an explainer for Carter Coin that demystifies cryptocurrency for everyday users. The piece breaks down blockchain concepts, tokenomics, and the platform's unique value proposition into digestible visual sequences.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: BarkBusters / Dog Training
video:video.video:description: Created a charming animation for BarkBusters' dog training programme. The piece uses engaging character animation to demonstrate their training methodology, making complex behavioural concepts accessible to pet owners.
video:video.video:category: Brand animation and agency motion design

video:video.video:title: AMSED / Motion Graphic
video:video.video:description: Produced a motion graphic animation for AMSED, blending dynamic typography and visual design to create an engaging brand piece that captures the energy and innovation behind the organisation.
video:video.video:category: Brand animation and agency motion design

video:video.video:title: Shape Connect / Website Security
video:video.video:description: Animated an explainer for Shape Connect's website security platform. The piece visualises how cyber threats are detected and neutralised in real-time, making complex security infrastructure accessible to non-technical decision-makers.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: Shape Connect / Website Security: Additional video
video:video.video:description: Animated an explainer for Shape Connect's website security platform. The piece visualises how cyber threats are detected and neutralised in real-time, making complex security infrastructure accessible to non-technical decision-makers.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: Senate Matching / Data Matching
video:video.video:description: Created an explainer for Senate Matching's data matching platform. The animation demonstrates how disparate data sources are connected, reconciled, and unified, transforming raw records into actionable intelligence.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: Trulet / AI Property Management
video:video.video:description: Animated an explainer for Trulet's AI property management platform. The piece showcases how landlords and property managers can automate tenant screening, rent collection, and maintenance workflows through intelligent automation.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: Joineree / Marketplace Recruitment
video:video.video:description: Created an explainer for Joineree's marketplace recruitment platform. The animation demonstrates how employers and candidates are matched through a transparent, skill-based marketplace that eliminates traditional recruitment friction.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: Joineree / Marketplace Recruitment: Additional video
video:video.video:description: Created an explainer for Joineree's marketplace recruitment platform. The animation demonstrates how employers and candidates are matched through a transparent, skill-based marketplace that eliminates traditional recruitment friction.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: Bambora / Payment Gateway
video:video.video:description: Animated an explainer for Bambora's payment gateway platform. The piece walks through how businesses can accept, manage, and reconcile payments across multiple channels with a single, integrated solution.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: Swell Consulting / AI Accounting
video:video.video:description: Created an explainer for Swell Consulting's AI-powered accounting service. The animation demonstrates how machine learning automates bookkeeping, reconciliation, and reporting, freeing accountants to focus on strategic advisory work.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: Swell Consulting / AI Accounting: Additional video
video:video.video:description: Created an explainer for Swell Consulting's AI-powered accounting service. The animation demonstrates how machine learning automates bookkeeping, reconciliation, and reporting, freeing accountants to focus on strategic advisory work.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: Amplify / Live Music App
video:video.video:description: Produced an explainer for Amplify's live music discovery app. The animation captures the energy of live music while demonstrating how users can find, follow, and attend gigs from emerging artists in their area.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: NSW Gov / Pinch Point Explained
video:video.video:description: Created an animated explainer for the NSW Government's Pinch Point Programme. The piece visualises how traffic congestion is identified, analysed, and addressed through targeted infrastructure investments across Sydney.
video:video.video:category: Data visualisation and government explainer video

video:video.video:title: NeatStreets / Report Hazards
video:video.video:description: Animated an explainer for NeatStreets' community hazard reporting app. The piece demonstrates how citizens can photograph and report local hazards, triggering automated workflows that connect reports to the right council teams for resolution.
video:video.video:category: Data visualisation and government explainer video

video:video.video:title: Hey You / Food Ordering App
video:video.video:description: Created an explainer for Hey You's food ordering app. The animation showcases the seamless experience of ordering ahead from local cafes and restaurants, from browsing menus to skipping the queue with a single tap.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: Bresic Whitney / Estate Agent
video:video.video:description: Produced a brand animation for Bresic Whitney that captures their distinctive approach to real estate. The piece blends architectural aesthetics with community storytelling, positioning them as a design-led, people-first agency.
video:video.video:category: Brand animation and agency motion design

video:video.video:title: READ / Medical Journals
video:video.video:description: Animated an explainer for READ's medical journal platform. The piece demonstrates how clinicians can access, filter, and stay current with the latest peer-reviewed research, transforming how medical professionals consume evidence-based knowledge.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: ARK / Product Concept
video:video.video:description: ARK needed to explain their new modular design technology in layman's terms. We brought their platform to life with visuals that replicate the design process and crafted a story to explain exactly what ARK does, making complex modular architecture immediately clear.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: Cart-share / Startup Explainer
video:video.video:description: Produced a concise startup explainer for Cart-share that distils their value proposition into a punchy 30-second piece. Built for social and landing pages where attention is scarce and clarity is everything.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: Ranalytic / RF Scanner
video:video.video:description: Created an explainer for Ranalytic's RF scanning technology. The animation walks through how their hardware and software work together to detect and analyse radio frequency signals, making deeply technical concepts accessible to buyers and partners.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video

video:video.video:title: Uclusion / Product Decision Platform
video:video.video:description: Animated an explainer for Uclusion's product decision platform. The piece demonstrates how teams can use structured feedback from customers and users to prioritise features, replacing gut instinct with data-driven product decisions.
video:video.video:category: SaaS explainer and product demo video
